name: Jelly Cube Adventure
description: Dive into Jelly Cube Adventure, a thrilling candy-filled journey where you are the master of your destiny! Dash through colorful, challenging levels, collect sweet treasures, and conquer intricate puzzles using your powerful jelly speed. Create your own candy worlds with the intuitive Jelly Level Editor, craft devious traps, winding paths, and share your levels with friends worldwide. Swipe, dash, and crush candies in hundreds of sugar challenges. Enjoy beautiful graphics, adaptive gameplay, and 100% free-to-play fun. Test your mastery, showcase creativity, and immerse in the ultimate jelly candy adventure today!
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
